    1. calculateScore(Player)

Interface ScoreRule

All Known Implementing Classes:
BearScoreCardA, BearScoreCardB, BearScoreCardC, BearScoreCardD, BuzzardScoreCardA, BuzzardScoreCardB, BuzzardScoreCardC, BuzzardScoreCardD, ElkScoreCardA, ElkScoreCardB, ElkScoreCardC, ElkScoreCardD, FoxScoreCardA, FoxScoreCardB, FoxScoreCardC, FoxScoreCardD, SalmonScoreCardA, SalmonScoreCardB, SalmonScoreCardC, SalmonScoreCardD
public interface ScoreRule
Represents the scoring rule for an animal card in the Cascadia game.

Each animal card in the game implements this interface to define its specific scoring logic. The scoring rule takes into account the player's current state, such as their board and other game factors, to calculate the score.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    calculateScore(Player player)
    Calculates the score for the given player based on the specific scoring rule of the implementing animal card.

  • Method Details

    • calculateScore

      int calculateScore(Player player)
      Calculates the score for the given player based on the specific scoring rule of the implementing animal card.
      Parameters:
      player - the Player whose score is being calculated
      Returns:
      the score as an integer value
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the player is null
